description: Conservative local assistant driver contracts for phase-two outer-loop planning.
source_of_truth_note: Driver records describe local CLI contracts only; docs and checked-in fixtures remain authoritative.

items.name: Codex Driver
items.purpose: Describe a conservative local Codex CLI contract for later dry-run planning.
outputs: assistant session result when a later live runner is authorized
items.safe_use_notes: Capability probes may inspect PATH and help output only; live model calls require later explicit consent.

structured_output_support.evidence: Requires local CLI help or documentation verification before use.

items.sandbox_approval_controls: Expected to be controlled by the local Codex CLI and operator-selected permission posture; exact flags require local verification.
items.model_selection_support: Requires local CLI help or documentation verification.
items.reasoning_selection_support: Requires local CLI help or documentation verification.
items.fresh_session_behavior: Later runner should start a new bounded CLI invocation for one prompt payload.
items.resume_behavior: Unknown; do not assume resume support for batch execution.
known_limitations: Authentication, quota, structured output, and final-message capture are not verified by repo-local evidence.
No live prompt invocation is implemented in this prompt.
unsupported_operations: Do not call a model during capability probing.
Do not infer Claude subscription automation from this driver.

items.name: Pi Driver
items.purpose: Describe a conservative external-harness contract for Pi-style local usage.
outputs: assistant session result when a later live runner is authorized
items.safe_use_notes: Local Pi reference docs may inform the contract, but AHL must not edit pi-mono, copy Pi internals, or invoke Pi live until the operator confirms the safe command shape.

structured_output_support.evidence: Local Pi README describes print or JSON and RPC modes; exact AHL contract still requires probing.

final_message_capture_support.evidence: Pi print mode and JSON event mode are documented locally, but AHL has not validated final-message extraction from either mode.

items.sandbox_approval_controls: Controlled by Pi provider, tool, extension, and local settings; exact AHL-safe flags require verification.
items.model_selection_support: Pi owns provider and model selection. Local Pi README documents /model, --provider, --model, --models, and --list-models; AHL records desired values but should not reinterpret them.
items.reasoning_selection_support: Pi owns thinking selection. Local Pi README documents /settings, Shift+Tab, --thinking, and model suffixes; AHL should pass no reasoning flags until the operator verifies the intended Pi command.
items.fresh_session_behavior: AHL should prefer a new bounded Pi invocation with --no-session after confirming whether print or JSON mode is the safe headless contract.
items.resume_behavior: Local Pi README describes sessions; batch resume behavior requires explicit design.
known_limitations: Pi behavior is referenced from a local clone when present and must be verified on the operator machine.
AHL has not validated Pi print or JSON output enough to parse a final assistant message.
AHL has not validated Pi permission, session, extension, or package settings for unattended use.
No live Pi prompt invocation is implemented by this prompt.
unsupported_operations: Do not call a model during capability probing.
Do not assume API credentials or subscription login are available.
Do not invoke Pi from AHL tests.

items.name: Manual Driver
items.purpose: Represent copy/paste or human-operated assistant sessions when no safe CLI driver is available.
items.safe_use_notes: Manual execution has no executable probe and remains controlled by the operator.

structured_output_support.evidence: The operator records structured evidence in repo artifacts.

final_message_capture_support.evidence: The operator summarizes the result without storing raw transcripts by default.

items.fresh_session_behavior: Operator starts a fresh assistant session and pastes the bounded prompt payload.
items.resume_behavior: Operator decides whether a manual resume is appropriate; runner should not automate it.
known_limitations: Structured evidence depends on operator discipline.
unsupported_operations: Do not automate browser or subscription UI interactions.
Do not store raw transcripts by default.
